data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for branching logic (if opened email, do X; if not, do Y). However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that demonstrate this branching logic is implemented or functioning as required. The linked use case outlines the need for such logic, but there is no supporting evidence to confirm its coverage, leading to a clear gap in requirement satisfaction.
gaps: Branching logic (if opened email, do X; if not, do Y) is not evidenced.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
